title: Play 2-M
description: Shows variation in play by independently interacting with 5 different items (e.g., plays with rings, then a ball, then a block). (TO: 30 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he independently plays with 5 different items during a 30-minute observation. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he independently plays with 3 different items during a 30-minute observation.

title: Play 3-M
description: Demonstrates generalization by engaging in exploratory movement and playing with the toys in a novel environment for 2 minutes (e.g., in a new playroom). (TO: 30 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he independently engages in exploratory movement and touching in a new or novel play area for 2 minutes during a 30-minute observation. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he independently engages in exploratory movement and touching in a new or novel play area for 1 minute during a 30-minute observation.

title: Play 4-M
description: Independently engages in movement play for 2 minutes (e.g., swinging, dancing, rocking, jumping, climbing). (TO: 30 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he engages in movement play for 2 minutes during a 30-minute observation. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he engages in movement play for 1 minute during a 30-minute observation.

title: Play 5-M
description: Independently engages in cause-and-effect play for 2 minutes (e.g., dumping containers, playing with pop-up toys, pulling toys, etc.). (TO: 30 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he independently engages in cause-and-effect play for 2 minutes during a 30-minute observation. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he independently engages in cause-and-effect play for 1 minute during a 30-minute observation.

title: Social 1-M
description: Visually tracks and shows interest in people's movement at least 5 times. (TO: 30 min)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he visually tracks and shows interest in people's movement at least 5 times during a 30-minute observation. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he visually tracks and shows interest in people's movement at least 2 times during a 30-minute observation.

title: Social 2-M
description: Indicates that he wants to be held or physically played with 2 times (e.g., climbs up on his mom's lap). (TO: 60 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he indicates that he wants to be held or physically played with 2 times during a 1-hour observation. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he indicates that he wants to be held or physically played with 1 time during a 1-hour observation.

title: Social 3-M
description: Spontaneously looks (glances) at other children 5 times. (TO: 30 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he spontaneously looks (glances) at other children 5 times during a 30-minute observation. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he spontaneously looks (glances) at other children 2 times during a 30-minute observation.

title: Social 4-M
description: Spontaneously engages in parallel play by other children for a total of 2 minutes (e.g., sits in the sandbox near other children). (TO: 30 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he spontaneously engages in parallel play by other children for a total of 2 minutes during a 30-minute observation. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he spontaneously engages in parallel play by other children for a total of 1 minute during a 30-minute observation.
